reasoning: Since web search tools are not available and checking the specific Polymarket URL failed, I am relying on a base-rate estimate of Google's competitiveness in the AI race as of late 2025. Historically, OpenAI and Anthropic have dominated the #1 position on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena Leaderboard, although Google has occasionally reached the top with experimental Gemini models. Given the intense competition and the resources at Google's disposal, they are one of the top three contenders. I estimate OpenAI has the highest probability (~40-45%), followed by Anthropic (~25-30%), and Google (~20-25%). The rule that Google wins a tie against OpenAI (but loses a tie against Anthropic) provides a slight bump, leading to a final probability estimate of 23%.
